The '''Lucky Star''' was a casino in [[Kushal Vogh]] on [[Elerion]]. It was owned by [[Gogol (owner)|Gogol]], and was shut down by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] after their attempt to get [[Nescan Tal'yo]]'s holocube failed.
